title: Smelting Touch
body: This mod allows you to add the Smelting Touch enchantment to your pickaxe, this enchantment will allow you to automatically smelt blocks with your pickaxe such as ores into their various ingots and stone will stay as stone when you mine it and yes it is compatible with other tools :) such as a shovel this will allow you to mine clay into bricks, sand into glass and much much more, and yes we made sure to make it compatible with fortune and incompatible to Silk Touch due to the issues that would bring, have fun :)!
